title: Expand FTS5 index to include summary, tags, and resolved_query

acceptanceCriteria.text: FTS5 content definition expanded to include summary + tags fields
Triggers added to rebuild FTS entries when summary or tags change
Test: searching for a tag name (e.g., 'architecture') returns chunks with that tag
Test: searching for a resolved_query term returns matching chunks
Run CodeRabbit review - must pass (or create BUG if unfixable)
Commit: feat: US-001 expand FTS5 to index summary, tags, resolved_query
